channel.title: Salesforce.com on no exceptions
channel.description: Recent content in Salesforce.com on no exceptions

item.title: Walking up Apex
item.description: picking up on apex Data Types All variables and expressions have a datatype. Need to understand why an expression would have a datatype (?) A string, Integer, boolean -> all inherit object. remind me of Ruby where everything is an Object. Saw a creative use of object, when using object as an attribute on a method - so that it can handle the various types that are listed as an object.
